title: Cleistocalyx longiflorus

intro: Cleistocalyx longiflorus, also known as the Java plum or Java tree, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Myrtaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing fever, treating wounds, and protecting against oxidative stress.
